parsed_review.summary: CP00-683 is a Risk-B, 40-unit descriptor bridge pack (RP22.P06.M07.S07-RP22.P06.M09.S02) covering the External Integrations I P06 Test And Golden Case Set tail (16), Hermes Evidence Packet (22), and Claude Review Packet head (2). Through read-only source inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) I confirmed the pack's production_ready claim and boundaries hold: (1) Implementation - service.js createExternalIntegrationsICp683* descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff factories are frozen via freezeCp683Result, which stamps synthetic_only, no_real_data, writes_product_state:false, no access/refresh-token or secret persistence, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, leak_detected:false. (2) Validators - validators.js coverage + descriptor validators enforce descriptor-only rows, no runtime opening (permission/audit/ai-retrieval/analytics/hermes/claude/fixture/test/ui/persistence/command all false), no cross-tenant access, no missing-context fallback, no real/fixture/golden payloads, and assertFalse on claude_is_final_approval. (3) Distribution - implementation 12 / security_audit 10 / ui 8 / claude_review 2 / test 8 = 40, and micro counts M07=16 / M08=22 / M09=2, match the prompt baseline, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, registry requirements, and model.test.js deepEqual assertions. (4) Authority - Claude packet read_only:true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false; descriptor authority_boundary has claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true. (5) Hermes - used only for deterministic descriptor evidence (receipt_shape descriptor_only_..._no_write, hermes_runtime_opened:false, command_result pending_until_closeout_pack_validation), not product runtime. (6) Manifest/adjudication/inspection are mutually consistent: status in_progress, production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, descriptor_only:true, runtime_opened:false, pack_level_claude_review pending_review with empty receipts; the pack does not prematurely claim runtime or enterprise trust. (7) Review hardening - readiness-report auth_preflight passed (exit_code 0, stdout 1446 bytes, valid JSON result); no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced-with-prose/tool-call-shaped evidence; claude-review-result correctly records exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run:false with no prior invalid attempts; no pre-existing raw-output/receipt to reject. Recorded command-evidence shows all 22 commands at exit_code 0 (node --check x5, closeout-pack(-plan):validate, rp22 external-integrations-i validate, node --test model.test.js, rp22/weighted/spec/fullplan/validate/goal:closeout/rp00 control-plane validate, git diff --check, npm test, npm build); these are reported evidence I did not re-run (read-only, no Bash). Index re-exports (index.js export * from registry/service/validators) resolve all five required_public_exports. Queue confirms live_latest_pack_id CP00-683, next CP00-684. Unrelated dirty files (plan/queue, progress-control-room, workbook/*, LDIP invalid-attempt) are correctly segregated as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved with active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted empty. No P0-P3 findings. This receipt does not block CP00-683 pack or goal closeout; final human/enterprise-trust approval remains outside this read-only review.
